name: Mariah williams
ai_summary: Mariah Williams from Augusta, GA seeks FT/PT childcare positions with Monday-Friday availability and focuses on safety-first conflict resolution. She describes herself as patient and calm with a strong commitment to creating positive learning environments for children.
